purpose: Tool-neutral image prompt for the project-level Lu Mi multi-state character reference board.

shared_rules.format: single vertical PNG production character reference board, no visible labels or captions inside the image
shared_rules.style: low-magic eastern epic, tactile realistic costume and material rendering, restrained cinematic lighting, readable for mobile vertical production reference
shared_rules.locked_badge_rule: Do not redesign existing faction emblems. The Northern Beastfolk Alliance Wanshou emblem is locked. Do not create a new deer clan crest, personal Lu Mi crest, modern logo, large chest badge, shoulder patch, flag, or banner. Use the locked Wanshou emblem and northern symbol board only as root references for bonewood knot, antler-branch, rawhide cord, wind-worn bone, oath cord, and tiny ice-blue survival-fire material language.
must_have: Lu Mi must read as a very beautiful young adult Frosthoof deer noble shaman around 20
humanoid-dominant deer beastfolk identity with clear soft deer ears and short antlers or bone-gold antler ornaments
three states must preserve one continuous identity
rare white deer, silver fox, or snow leopard fur layers; ice-blue thick woven inner garment; bone-white robe or skirt; silver thread; bone-gold ornaments; jade clasps; aurora-green beads
bone flute and snow herb pouch must appear in every state or as locked detail panels
small ice-blue survival or shaman fire only, no attack magic
no readable text, no labels, no UI, no watermark
shared_rules.negative_prompt: redesigned Northern Beastfolk Alliance emblem, new deer crest, personal crest, modern logo, chest badge, shoulder patch, banner, flag, ordinary human wearing antler headband, human with costume ears only, full animal creature, deer mascot, childlike girl, cute animal, generic elf princess, southern palace princess, sexy exposed costume, poor ragged shaman, torn dirty fur, beggar rags, full-body mud, monster beastfolk, game orc camp, high-saturation xianxia glow, blue-purple magic aura, large spell circle, attack magic, floating weapons, Qingming white official costume, Grey Wall soldier grey cloth, Zhaoming vermilion-blue formal robe, readable text, captions, Chinese characters, Latin letters, UI, watermark, oversaturated game art, cyberpunk, sci-fi

input_images.role: existing vertical project character board layout reference
existing vertical project character board layout and detail-panel reference
northern bonewood, antler, rawhide, fur, bone flute, oath cord material reference
locked Wanshou emblem reference only; do not redesign or create a new deer crest
northern object-symbol reference for bonewood knot, antler-branch, rawhide cord, and ice-blue fire points; not a new badge

prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical PNG production character reference board for Lu Mi from the series Severed Homeland. Use the existing project character boards as layout logic: top row three full-body states of the same person, lower rows with close-up detail panels and material swatches, no visible labels or captions. Lu Mi is a very beautiful young adult Frosthoof deer noble shaman around 20, representative of the northern disaster-source-seeking faction. She is a humanoid-dominant deer beastfolk noble, not an ordinary human with antler accessories and not a full animal creature. She must have clear soft deer ears and short antlers or noble bone-gold antler ornaments, pale clear eyes, a refined beautiful face, long neck and shoulder line, restrained northern noble posture, and alert shaman stillness. Show the same Lu Mi in three continuous states: 1) northern noble snowwear, layered rare white deer, silver fox, or snow leopard fur shoulder cape over an ice-blue thick woven inner garment and bone-white long robe or skirt, silver thread, jade clasps, aurora-green small beads, carefully trimmed noble fur edge pattern, bone flute and herb pouch still present; 2) disaster-source-seeking travel state, the noble fur system tightened into a short cape and travel wrap for snow movement, rawhide ties, dark blood oath cord, wind-worn bone flute, snow herb pouch with frozen grass stems and dried herbs, dark brown hide belt, snow dust, still refined and noble, not poor or ragged; 3) Frosthoof ritual state, bone-gold forehead ornaments, short antler jewelry, ice-blue ritual shoulder cloth, aurora-green bead strings, bone-white carved pendants, silver thread, small bone cup or shallow bowl with tiny ice-blue survival or shaman fire lighting her hands and fabric edges. Include lower detail panels: Lu Mi's beautiful young adult face with pale eyes, soft deer ears, and short antlers or antler ornaments; close-up of soft deer ear and bone-gold antler ornament; rare white fur cape edge with refined antler-branch pattern and limited wind wear; wind-worn bone flute with holes, rawhide tie, dark blood oath cord; snow herb pouch with frozen grass stems, jade clasp, rawhide knots, and snow grit; jade clasps, aurora-green beads, silver thread, and bone-gold ornaments; small ice-blue survival/shaman fire in a bone cup or shallow bowl; material swatches of snow-white fur, ice-blue thick weave, bone-white cloth, silver grey, jade green, bone-gold, straw yellow, hide dark brown, dark blood oath cord, and ice-blue fire. Badge rule: do not redesign the locked Northern Beastfolk Alliance Wanshou emblem. Do not create a new deer clan crest, personal Lu Mi crest, chest badge, shoulder patch, flag, or banner. Use the existing Wanshou and northern symbol language only as material reference for bonewood knots, antler-branch trim, rawhide cord, wind-worn bone, oath cord, and tiny ice-blue fire points. Low-magic eastern epic, tactile realistic fur, woven cloth, bone, antler, jade, rawhide, frozen grass, restrained cinematic lighting, production reference clarity. No visible labels, no captions, no readable text, no UI, no watermark.
prompts.negative_prompt: redesigned Northern Beastfolk Alliance emblem, new deer crest, personal crest, modern logo, chest badge, shoulder patch, banner, flag, ordinary human wearing antler headband, human with costume ears only, full animal creature, deer mascot, childlike girl, cute animal, generic elf princess, southern palace princess, sexy exposed costume, poor ragged shaman, torn dirty fur, beggar rags, full-body mud, monster beastfolk, game orc camp, high-saturation xianxia glow, blue-purple magic aura, large spell circle, attack magic, floating weapons, Qingming white official costume, Grey Wall soldier grey cloth, Zhaoming vermilion-blue formal robe, readable text, captions, Chinese characters, Latin letters, UI, watermark, oversaturated game art, cyberpunk, sci-fi
